CustomField.description: Enter availability text to appear on the development page of the AA Website for developments administered by CGP&H.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
Enter availability text to appear on the development page of the AA Website for developments administered by CGP&H.
Launch: <#> rental <OR SALE> apartments will be available at DVELOPMENT NAME>. Join the MUNICIPALITY rental <OR SALE> waiting list by LOTTERY DATE to be included in the random selection. Veteran’s preference (if applicable).
Removal: We anticipate contacting the first applicants for the # apartments at DEVELOPMENT NAME in MONTH YYYY. Schedule is subject to change.
CustomField.label: Admin by CGP&H Availability Text
